message:
✨ Close dialog when starting AI missions from node drilldown

- Close the drilldown dialog when clicking AI mission buttons
- Use short cluster name in mission prompts for clarity
- Add closeDialog() calls to AI Diagnose and repair action buttons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
